name: rvv-i32-family-direct-helper-ssh-evidence-handoff
title: RVV i32 family direct helper SSH evidence handoff
description: Extend the RVV direct microkernel evidence runner so i32-vsub and i32-vmul exercise family-specific direct source/header/object helper routes and collect real ssh rvv external caller evidence.
creator: codex
notes: Completed direct helper evidence handoff for i32-vsub and i32-vmul. Non-bundle direct mode now invokes family source/header/object route ids; dry-run records direct source/header helper artifacts; ssh mode records source/header/object artifacts and runs generated external callers against direct helper objects on ssh rvv. No runtime/correctness claim is made without ssh_evidence=true.
